what: Byte-exact binary round-trip through the installed Android app's WebView transport (fresh debug build 2026-07-01 14:10, ai.elizaos.app on emulator-5556 / Android 14 x86_64), driven via CDP-over-adb inside the real app context against the agent API.
note: the content-addressed URL IS the uploaded sha256 — store dedup working as designed (#8876)
finding: Capacitor.Plugins.Share=false, Capacitor.Plugins.Filesystem=false on this build — @capacitor/share + @capacitor/filesystem were never dependencies of packages/app, so download-share.ts's native save/share path is structurally dead on Android AND iOS. Root fix: add both plugins (PR referenced on issue #10936).
